_note: DEATH-BY-HP-WRITE TEST, STEP 2 of 2 - HP=0 + KO FLAG (docs/modding/07 Test 2b). Use this ONLY if step 1 (death-test.json) left a 'zombie' at 0 HP. Same as step 1 but CauseDeathOnZeroHp=true: after forcing a foe's HP to 0, also set the death/status bit found in Test 2a (struct +0x61 |= 0x20). WATCH: does the enemy die now? Look for [DEATH-WRITE ...] lines confirming the flag write. If it dies -> we can cause death ourselves (gate 2 solved). If still a zombie -> death is also tracked outside the unit struct (turn manager / AI), and we capture more.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (set on every death in Test 2a)
